subcodes.first_line: O thou namesake of Kalim! The word Moses in the Hebrew tongue was "Mosheh," meaning "drawn forth from the water" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی کلیم کلمهٴ موسی در لسان عبرانی موشی بود یعنی برداشته از آب...
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Mosaic imagery, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
